message: add kenaz chat UI (gemma 4 26b, 16384 max tokens)
fix(kenaz): memoize visibleViews to stop polling render loop
fix(kenaz): skip toolbar re-render and dock badge update when counts unchanged
chore: bump kenaz to 1.3.3 to trigger build runner
Dagaz 1.3.1: high-contrast pending invite ghosts (white / red if conflict)
fix: handle mailto: URIs so Kenaz actually opens compose
feat: support targeted app builds e.g. --force laguz
fix: remove -b flag from sftp calls (causes abort on mkdir failure)
